ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the institution based on the number of complaints */,
  "total_complaints" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints received against the institution */,
  "total_monetary_relief" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints resolved with monetary relief */,
  "percent_monetary_relief" REAL /* Percentage of complaints resolved with monetary relief */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for complaints */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for complaints */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the institution was established */,
  "regulatory_status" TEXT /* Current regulatory status (e.g., compliant, under investigation) */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last regulatory audit */,
  "average_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken to resolve complaints */,
  "consumer_satisfaction_score" REAL /* Average consumer satisfaction score based on feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial institution the complaint is against */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the consumer who filed the complaint */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "date_resolved" TEXT /* Date the complaint was resolved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "monetary_relief" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the complaint was resolved with monetary relief */,
  "category_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of category IDs (for multiple categories) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the complaint (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name or ID of the representative assigned to the complaint */,
  "resolution_time_days" INTEGER /* Number of days taken to resolve the complaint */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of how the complaint was resolved */,
  "consumer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the consumer after resolution */,
  "regulatory_action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to any regulatory action taken (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumers ("consumer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumers" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the consumer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the consumer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the consumer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the consumer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the consumer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the consumer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the consumer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the consumer */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity (e.g., complaint filing) */,
  "total_complaints" INTEGER /* Total number of complaints filed by the consumer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the complaint category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES complaint_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint-category mapping */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint ID */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES complaint_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_category_mapping_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)
